name: First Steps CLI App
description: Build a simple command-line app that prints your name.
instructions: Create a Python file called main.py. Inside it, print your name and a welcome message. Run it in your terminal.

name: Build a Calculator
description: Create a simple calculator using Python.
instructions: Use Python to build a calculator that can add, subtract, multiply, and divide.

name: Website Portfolio
instructions: Use HTML, CSS, and JavaScript to create a portfolio site showcasing your projects.
